cleavage agent: digestion with sequencing-grade trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI, USA) overnight
enrichment method: purified the protein from the cell culture medium by Ni-NTA and size exclusion chromatography
fractionation method: purified the protein from the cell culture medium by Ni-NTA and size exclusion chromatography
fragmentation method: generate fragment ions by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD, NCE:25%)
instrument: using a Q Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: matrix-assisted laser desorption ionisation–time of flight (MALDI-TOF) mass spectrometry
